reviews.review_title: More of and endless runner than racing.
reviews.review_description: At first I got excited as this looked like a solid racer, basically you have to try and get as far as possible without hitting any cars. As soon as you hit a car bam that's your score. It gets a bit repetitive as it's a bit dull right now. I think with some updates it will be one of the best.
I would love and adore a 1st person view.  The cars are visually great but I wish they had drastically different stats and the ability to use in different levels.

reviews.review_title: Please fix aspect ratio for S8
reviews.review_description:
I just finished playing this with galaxy s8 and it is not formatted correctly as making my eyes cross

Also I played with Steel series Xl gamepad and only left joy stick works for throttle and turning. 

Please fix for use of 2 joy sticks - one throttle and one turning or use shoulder buttons for brake and throttle.

Title says it all, its a fun little endless driving game similar to something you would find on a phone app but in VR. It had a few glitches at times such as not letting me control the car but it fixed itself and works fine now. Its something I can see myself playing for 10 minutes once in a while. The graphics are overall decent and style of the game is actually pretty good. Has very minimal content with only 3 cars and 2 maps at the moment but, since its an endless runner type game Its fine. For its low price, its worth the buy if you want something to play once in a while for fun!
